overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, crossing intersections and sidewalks lined with towering buildings covered in bright neon advertisements. The footage is from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring wet reflective streets, futuristic vehicles, and diverse pedestrians in a dense urban environment with dramatic artificial lighting.

events.description: white and red futuristic car drives past from left to right
finishes crossing street and steps onto sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
person in white clothing crossing the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: yellow striped crosswalk markings on the wet asphalt
large digital billboard displaying a woman's face with purple neon lighting
tall street lamp with multiple fixtures illuminating the intersection
futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with the camera crossing a striped crosswalk. A white car passes by on the right while neon billboards illuminate the scene. The wet asphalt reflects the colorful lights as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with commercial storefronts and trash disposal

events.description: pedestrian with white umbrella passes close by on the right
passes green dumpsters and continues along the barrier-lined sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing pedestrians and street elements

notable_agents.action: person carrying a white umbrella walking toward the camera
person in red shirt standing with arms crossed near the street

entered.detail: large green industrial trash bins lined up along the sidewalk barrier
red metal barriers separating the sidewalk from the building facade
gray concrete pavement with red painted curb edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with red barriers and green dumpsters on the right. The camera passes several pedestrians including one with a distinctive white umbrella. The purple billboard fades into the distance on the right as the street continues straight ahead toward a towering building with multiple digital screens.

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tall building covered in stacked digital billboards
black futuristic car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking toward the large building while occasionally looking up at the architecture

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt and dark pants walking ahead on the sidewalk
black car driving past on the street to the left

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building covered with multiple stacked digital advertisement screens displaying various images
small food vendor cart with umbrella on the sidewalk
tall palm trees visible down the street on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a wider sidewalk section toward a massive tower covered in bright digital billboards. The street opens up with palm trees visible in the distance. A street vendor cart sits on the right sidewalk while vehicles pass by on the left. The camera tilts up to admire the towering structure ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with outdoor seating

events.description: enters covered walkway transitioning from outdoor street to indoor commercial space
moves into dimmer interior area with green neon open signs and artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a building entrance with covered walkway and seating areas

notable_agents.action: person sitting at outdoor seating area near the entrance
person walking into the covered entrance ahead of the camera

entered.detail: large entrance archway leading into a covered commercial area
roofed pedestrian walkway with overhead lighting
green neon signs reading OPEN above storefronts
plastic chairs and tables arranged outside the commercial establishment

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a large building entrance, transitioning from the open street into a covered walkway. Green neon 'OPEN' signs illuminate the entrance area where people sit at outdoor tables. The camera moves into the sheltered space, leaving the street behind as the lighting shifts to interior artificial sources.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a vibrant, rain-slicked city intersection into the sheltered entrance of a towering urban complex. It begins by crossing a striped crosswalk under the glow of neon billboards, with the wet asphalt reflecting colorful lights as a white car passes by. As the camera reaches the opposite sidewalk, the scene shifts to a concrete path lined with red barriers and green dumpsters, passing pedestrians and a figure with a white umbrella while a purple billboard fades into the distance. The perspective then expands onto a wider walkway where palm trees appear in the distance and a street vendor sits nearby, before the camera tilts upward to take in a massive tower draped in digital screens. Finally, the movement leads away from the open street and into a covered walkway, where green neon signs illuminate outdoor seating as the lighting transitions from the city's nocturnal glow to interior artificial sources.
